name: The Bread Sort
description: Benny has mixed up his bread deliveries! Drag each bread item into the basket with the matching shape.
learningFocus: Matching, visual recognition, sorting by category
hints: Look carefully at the shape on each piece of bread — can you find a basket with the same shape?
Try starting with just one bread. Find its matching shape on one of the baskets.
The circle basket is on the left. Does any bread have a circle on it?
failureMessage: Hmm, not quite — but don't worry, give it another go!

reward.text: Brilliant! You sorted all the bread! Benny is so pleased. Here is your first golden key piece!
